reviews.review_title: Can you turn one of Daniel's friends int
reviews.review_description: Can you turn one of Daniel's friends into the fiery furnace?

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you so much for your 5-star rating, I really appreciate it!

reviews.review_description: The experience is about 15 mins in length which is just right. It is pretty awe inspiring walking into the holiest of holies… Learned quite a bit I never knew, like 12 pieces of bread symbolizing the 12 tribes.  This is what VR is made for

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your kind words and thoughtful review! I truly appreciate it. I am very glad you enjoyed the experience and learned something new from it.
